name: Margaret Calloway
title: Founding Partner
education: B.A., Political Science, University of Oregon
bio: Margaret founded the firm in 2008 after eight years practicing family law at a larger Portland firm. She has handled more than 600 family law and estate matters, and is known for keeping clients focused on long-term outcomes during some of the hardest weeks of their lives. She is a frequent volunteer mediator with the county's family court self-help center.

name: Daniel Reyes
title: Founding Partner
education: J.D., University of Oregon School of Law
B.S., Criminal Justice, Portland State University
bio: Daniel spent six years as a public defender before co-founding the firm, and that courtroom experience still shapes how he prepares every case. He has tried more than 50 cases to verdict and is board-certified in criminal trial advocacy. Outside the office, he coaches youth basketball in the neighborhood he grew up in.

name: Priya Anand
title: Senior Associate
education: J.D., UC Berkeley School of Law
bio: Priya joined the firm in 2019 after several years advising startups at a San Francisco firm, and now serves as outside counsel to dozens of small and mid-sized businesses across the Pacific Northwest. She specializes in formation, contracts, and the kind of practical guidance that keeps business owners out of court in the first place.

name: Jonathan Ortiz
title: Associate
education: J.D., Willamette University College of Law
B.A., Urban Studies, Portland State University
bio: Jonathan represents buyers, sellers, and landlords across residential and commercial transactions, and previously worked in title insurance before law school, which gives him an eye for the closing issues that catch other buyers off guard.
